'''dharate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jinglingly|jinglingly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-r-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jinglingly|jinglingly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dharate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dharate|dharate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dharatesher|dharatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dharatesherĂ«m|dharatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dharatero|dharatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dharateshĂ«|dharateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dharateshĂ«m|dharateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidharatero|gokidharatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidharateshĂ«|gokidharateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidharateshĂ«m|gokidharateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godharankerom|godharankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godharankeshĂ«|godharankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godharankeshĂ«m|godharankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godharankeya|godharankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dharaterom|dharaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dharatemu|dharatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dharateya|dharateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidharaterom|gokidharaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidharatemu|gokidharatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidharateya|gokidharateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhararate|dhararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhararatesher|dhararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhararatesherĂ«m|dhararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhararatero|dhararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhararateshĂ«|dhararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhararateshĂ«m|dhararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhararatero|gokidhararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhararateshĂ«|gokidhararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhararateshĂ«m|gokidhararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhararankerom|godhararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhararankeshĂ«|godhararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhararankeshĂ«m|godhararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhararankeya|godhararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhararaterom|dhararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhararatemu|dhararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhararateya|dhararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhararaterom|gokidhararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhararatemu|gokidhararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhararateya|gokidhararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhĂŠrĂŠte|dhĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhĂŠrĂŠtesher|dhĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|dhĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠrĂŠtero|dhĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|dhĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|dhĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠrĂŠtero|gokidhĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokidhĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidhĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhĂŠrĂŠnkerom|godhĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|godhĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godhĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhĂŠrĂŠnkeya|godhĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhĂŠrĂŠterom|dhĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhĂŠrĂŠtemu|dhĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhĂŠrĂŠteya|dhĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠrĂŠterom|gokidhĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokidhĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhĂŠrĂŠteya|gokidhĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhafrafte|dhafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dhafraftesher|dhafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafraftesherĂ«m|dhafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafraftero|dhafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhafrafteshĂ«|dhafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafrafteshĂ«m|dhafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafraftero|gokidhafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhafrafteshĂ«|gokidhafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafrafteshĂ«m|gokidhafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godhafrafnkerom|godhafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhafrafnkeshĂ«|godhafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhafrafnkeshĂ«m|godhafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godhafrafnkeya|godhafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dhafrafterom|dhafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhafraftemu|dhafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dhafrafteya|dhafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidhafrafterom|gokidhafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhafraftemu|gokidhafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidhafrafteya|gokidhafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
